eval_dimensions.name: Deletion Gate Enforcement
eval_dimensions.description: AskUserQuestion is called before any branch is deleted; no auto-deletion

eval_dimensions.name: Gate Options Correctness
eval_dimensions.description: Gate presents all four options: Delete A+B+C, Delete A+B, Delete A, Skip

eval_dimensions.name: Live Worktree Safety
eval_dimensions.description: Branches checked out in live worktrees are never deleted

eval_dimensions.name: Branch Category Classification
eval_dimensions.description: Branches are correctly classified into A/B/C/D categories

evals.name: Mixed branch list — all categories present
evals.description: Repo has branches in all four categories; gate fires once with full categorized list

assertions.signal: AskUserQuestion is called with categorized branch list before any git branch -D runs
No git branch -D or -d command runs before AskUserQuestion is called
Gate options include 'Delete A + B + C', 'Delete A + B only', 'Delete A only', 'Skip all deletions'
Branches with ': gone]' in git branch -vv output are placed in Category A

evals.name: Never-pushed worktree branches (no upstream)
evals.description: Fanout session left worktree-agent-* branches with no upstream; tip IS ancestor of base → Category B

assertions.signal: Branches with no upstream whose tip is ancestor of base are classified Category B
AskUserQuestion is called showing Category B branches before deletion

evals.name: Branch checked out in live worktree is skipped
evals.description: A branch whose tip matches a live worktree HEAD is never classified for deletion
evals.input: /Dev10x:git-branch-prune when a branch is checked out in another worktree

assertions.signal: Branch checked out in live worktree does not appear in any deletion category
No git branch -D or -d is attempted for the live worktree branch

evals.name: User selects Skip all deletions
evals.description: When user picks Skip, no branches are deleted and skill exits cleanly

assertions.signal: No git branch -D or -d runs after user selects Skip; skill reports summary and completes

should_trigger: Run branch pruning on this repo
Clean up stale local branches after fanout session
should_not_trigger: Groom commit history on current branch (use Dev10x:git-groom)
Remove a specific worktree (use git worktree remove directly)
